title: Developer Reference Datasets: Aspect Ratios, WCAG Contrast, Encoding Sizes
description:
Open, reproducible reference datasets for web and app developers: aspect-ratio pixel tables and common resolutions, WCAG 2.1 contrast ratios for a UI colour palette (with AA/AAA pass-fail), and character-encoding byte sizes (UTF-8 / UTF-16 / UTF-32) by script. Every value is produced by a small script in the repository, from first principles, so it can be verified or re-run.

Human-readable write-ups: https://cleanor.app/reference
